value.found_quote: When adding a custom MCP server as a connector in ChatGPT, the UI errors with “Error creating connector — Request timeout”, even though the MCP server successfully handles all expected calls. ... Requests with Accept: text/event-stream
value.rationale: The page describes adding a custom remote MCP server (mounted at /mcp, accessed over HTTPS by URL) as a connector in ChatGPT, with the MCP client (openai-mcp/1.0.0) making HTTP requests including Accept: text/event-stream (SSE). This substantiates that OpenAI supports remote MCP servers over HTTP/SSE. It is a third-party community/forum discussion, but it clearly describes the offering as functioning (despite a creation-timeout bug). No mention of deprecation, so treated as active.
